text:
General Sharman was an anime-only character in the 1999 adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 50 (1999) 

Background

General Sharman was a foreign country dictator, until his assassination. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Melody delivers a piece of General Sharman's Brain to the Nostrade's Mansion in qualification to become a Nostrade Family bodyguard. 

References
